name: creative-writing
description: Story Grid-based fiction writing toolkit for Pavi's original creative work. Scene analysis against 5 Commandments, mentor submission formatting for Joanne Mitchell, anti-AI prose cleaning, dictation transcript processing, and unstuck prompts. Covers Jim & Percy LitRPG project and future fiction. Not for audiobook narration — that's the audiobook-production plugin.
author: Pavitas Productions
